title: Nested options list (like in Gmail integration)
excerpt: How can I build a custom field with the nested options list like in the Gmail integration.

posts.author: Severyn (Severyn Vehera)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I build a custom field with the nested options list like in the Gmail integration.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Severyn !

This is only possible for native integrations as of today.

I will however, share this with our team as a feature request

Cheers,
Matias
